meta.title: Verified Paid Opportunities Directory
meta.description: Curated directory of legitimate paid opportunities including surveys, user testing, focus groups, product testing, mystery shopping, and clinical studies.

listings.title: Crowdtap
listings.description: Brand engagement platform offering quick surveys and product sampling. Answer short questions about brands for gift card rewards.

listings.title: e-Rewards
listings.description: Invite-only survey panel by Dynata. Offers opinion dollars redeemable for airline miles, hotel points, magazine subscriptions, and retail gift cards.
pros: Airline miles and hotel points as rewards
cons: Opinion dollars have limited redemption options

listings.title: Earnably
listings.description: GPT site with surveys, offer walls, and videos. Clean interface with Bitcoin, PayPal, and gift card cashout options.

listings.title: Forthright
listings.description: Transparent survey platform that shows pay upfront and respects your time. Compensates for disqualifications with sweepstakes entries.

listings.title: KashKick
listings.description: Cashback and survey platform offering paid surveys, game offers, and cashback deals. Pays via PayPal with a $10 minimum cashout. US only.

listings.title: Maru Voice Canada
listings.description: Canadian survey panel offering visa gift cards and Air Miles for participating in market research studies on Canadian brands and services.

listings.title: Measure Protocol
listings.description: Earn cryptocurrency for sharing anonymous behavioral data from your mobile device. Privacy-focused platform using blockchain technology for data ownership.
cons: Newer platform with limited track record

listings.title: PointClub
listings.description: Survey panel that rewards bonus points for consistent participation. Community-driven platform with member rewards and referral bonuses.

listings.title: PrizeRebel
listings.description: GPT (Get Paid To) site offering surveys, offers, and tasks. Level system that unlocks better rewards over time. $2 minimum cashout.
cons: Can be overwhelming for new users

listings.title: Pureprofile
listings.description: Australian-based global survey platform. Shows exact pay and time estimate before each survey. Earn cash for sharing opinions.
cons: Not many surveys in some regions

listings.title: Surveytime
listings.description: Instant-pay survey platform. Get $1 instantly via PayPal for every completed survey. No points, no minimums, just immediate cash.

listings.title: Tellwut
listings.description: Opinion poll and survey platform for US and Canadian users. Create your own polls or participate in others. Earn rewards points redeemable for gift cards.

listings.title: Testable Minds
listings.description: Academic research platform for cognitive and psychological studies. Participate in experiments from universities worldwide via your browser.

listings.title: Valued Opinions
listings.description: Survey panel by Dynata offering gift card rewards for sharing opinions about products, services, and advertisements.
pros: Higher pay per survey than average

listings.title: AttaPoll
listings.description: Mobile survey app with short, well-paying surveys. Clean interface with estimated time and pay shown upfront. Low $3 minimum payout.

listings.title: Google Opinion Rewards
listings.description: Google's mobile survey app. Answer quick questions about places you visited and earn Google Play credits (Android) or PayPal cash (iOS).
cons: Google Play credits on Android only

listings.title: InboxDollars
listings.description: Cash-based rewards site that pays for surveys, reading emails, watching videos, and playing games. Owned by Prodege. $5 sign-up bonus.
pros: Shows earnings in dollars not points

listings.title: LifePoints
listings.description: Global survey panel by Lightspeed (Kantar). Earn points for surveys on consumer products, services, and trends. Available in 40+ countries.

listings.title: Mindswarms
listings.description: Video survey platform paying $50 per study. Record short video responses to questions about your experiences with brands and products.

listings.title: MyPoints
listings.description: Points-based rewards platform offering surveys, shopping cashback, and various offers. Sister site to InboxDollars. Redeem for gift cards or PayPal.

listings.title: National Consumer Panel
listings.description: Nielsen/IRI joint venture. Scan your groceries and purchases with their app to earn reward points. One of the most unique panel formats.
pros: Gift cards and electronics as rewards

listings.title: Opinion Outpost
listings.description: Survey panel by Dynata (formerly Survey Sampling International). Complete surveys to earn points redeemable for cash and gift cards.

listings.title: Pinecone Research
listings.description: Invite-only premium survey panel by Nielsen. Known for consistent pay per survey and occasional product testing opportunities.
cons: Limited number of surveys per month

listings.title: Prolific
listings.description: Academic research platform connecting researchers with participants. Known for fair pay and ethical research standards. One of the highest-paying survey platforms.
pros: Highest per-hour pay among survey sites
cons: Some demographic groups get fewer studies
Must check frequently for new studies

listings.title: Qmee
listings.description: Survey platform with no minimum cashout threshold. Earn for surveys, search results, and cashback shopping. Instant PayPal payments.
pros: No minimum cashout — withdraw any amount

listings.title: Survey Junkie
listings.description: One of the largest survey platforms with millions of members. Complete profile surveys to get matched with relevant studies. Points convert to cash or gift cards.
cons: Points expire after 12 months of inactivity

listings.title: Swagbucks
listings.description: Multi-reward platform offering surveys, watching videos, shopping cashback, and more. One of the most popular GPT sites with a $5 signup bonus.
pros: Multiple ways to earn beyond surveys

listings.title: Toluna
listings.description: Large international survey community with product testing opportunities. Create polls, engage with content, and earn rewards for sharing opinions.

listings.title: YouGov
listings.description: Global public opinion and data analytics company. Participate in political, social, and brand surveys. Data used by major news outlets.
cons: Surveys can be short but low-paying

listings.title: BetaTesting
listings.description: Beta testing platform for pre-release software, apps, and hardware. Test new products before launch and provide structured feedback.

listings.title: Conversion Crimes
listings.description: Affordable usability testing platform for small businesses. Testers record their screens while completing tasks and earn per test.

listings.title: Loop11
listings.description: Usability testing tool that sometimes recruits testers through their panel. Test websites by completing specific tasks and answering questions.

listings.title: Premise
listings.description: Location-based data collection platform with a gig-economy style. Complete field tasks, photo verification jobs, and location-based surveys. Available globally with PayPal payouts.

listings.title: Testbirds
listings.description: European crowdtesting platform for software quality assurance and UX testing. Test apps and websites, report bugs, and earn per approved bug report.
cons: Pay per bug found — not guaranteed

listings.title: Ubertesters
listings.description: Mobile app testing platform where testers find bugs and provide feedback on pre-release applications. Earn per approved bug report.

listings.title: Userbrain
listings.description: Simple user testing platform based in Europe. Complete tests by following scenarios on websites and speaking your thoughts aloud.

listings.title: UserCrowd
listings.description: Quick design survey platform where you answer short questions about website designs and interfaces. Tasks pay $0.10-$0.50 each and take under a minute.
cons: Must do many for meaningful earnings

listings.title: Askable
listings.description: UX research participant platform operating in Australia, US, and UK. Pays $50-200 per session for interviews, usability tests, and focus groups.

listings.title: Clickworker
listings.description: Microtask and data-labeling platform offering data categorization, text creation, web research, and UHRS tasks from Microsoft. Low $5 minimum cashout via PayPal or SEPA.
pros: UHRS tasks available for higher pay

listings.title: dscout
listings.description: Mobile research platform for in-context research. Complete "missions" by recording video diary entries about your daily experiences. Pay $10-$300+ per mission.

listings.title: Intellizoom
listings.description: Platform by UserZoom for quick usability tests and surveys. Tests usually take 10-20 minutes and pay $2-$10 via PayPal.

listings.title: PlaytestCloud
listings.description: Gaming-focused user testing platform. Play unreleased mobile games and provide feedback. Get paid via PayPal for each playtest session.

listings.title: Recruit by UserZoom
listings.description: Paid UX studies from UserZoom, a leading enterprise UX research platform. Complete remote usability tests, card sorts, and surveys for $10-100 per test.
cons: Can be slow to get studies

listings.title: Respondent
listings.description: Premium research platform connecting professionals with high-paying studies. Focuses on B2B and professional audiences. Average pay $100-$250/hour.
cons: Studies can take weeks to schedule

listings.title: TestingTime
listings.description: European-focused UX research platform. Participate in user tests, interviews, and focus groups. Pay ranges from CHF 30-100 per session.

listings.title: Trymata (formerly TryMyUI)
listings.description: Usability testing platform. Record your screen and voice while testing websites and apps. Pay starts at $10 per 15-20 minute test.

listings.title: User Interviews
listings.description: Research recruitment platform connecting participants with paid studies. Studies include interviews, surveys, diary studies, and usability tests. Often $50-$200 per session.

listings.title: Userlytics
listings.description: Remote usability testing platform offering higher pay than competitors. Test websites, prototypes, and apps. Some tests include live interviews.

listings.title: UserTesting
listings.description: The largest user testing platform. Test websites, apps, and prototypes by recording your screen and speaking your thoughts aloud. $4-$10 per test.

listings.title: Wynter
listings.description: B2B message testing platform where you review marketing copy and provide feedback. Quick 5-15 minute tests paying $5-60. Ideal for professionals in B2B industries.

listings.title: Delve
listings.description: Research consultancy that recruits for focus groups, online communities, in-depth interviews, and shop-along studies.

listings.title: FindFocusGroups.com
listings.description: Directory of focus group opportunities across the US. Helps participants find studies in their area or online.

listings.title: Herron Associates
listings.description: Indianapolis-based market research facility conducting focus groups, interviews, and various qualitative research studies.

listings.title: Nichols Research
listings.description: Texas-based market research facility conducting focus groups, taste tests, mock trials, and other qualitative research studies.

listings.title: Opinions Ltd
listings.description: Market research company in the Queens, NY area. Recruits for focus groups, taste tests, and product evaluations with competitive pay.

listings.title: Probe Market Research
listings.description: Market research firm recruiting for focus groups, taste tests, product evaluations, and mock jury panels across the US.

listings.title: QualRec
listings.description: Qualitative research recruitment firm finding participants for focus groups, in-depth interviews, and ethnographic studies nationwide.

listings.title: 20|20 Research
listings.description: Research technology and services company offering online qualitative research including webcam focus groups, bulletin boards, and mobile diaries.

listings.title: Adler Weiner Research
listings.description: Chicago and Los Angeles based focus group facility. One of the oldest in the industry, conducting qualitative research since 1967.

listings.title: Discuss.io
listings.description: Video-based qualitative research platform hosting live focus groups, IDIs, and video surveys. Participants join from home via webcam for paid research sessions.

listings.title: Fieldwork
listings.description: One of the largest focus group facility networks in the US. Conducts in-person and online focus groups across 15+ locations. Pay typically $75-$250 per session.

listings.title: Focus Pointe Global
listings.description: National network of focus group facilities. Operates in multiple US cities and conducts a wide range of qualitative research studies.

listings.title: FocusGroup.com
listings.description: Online platform connecting participants with paid focus groups and research studies across the US. Lists studies from multiple facilities.

listings.title: L&E Research
listings.description: Full-service market research company with focus group facilities across the US. Conducts qualitative and quantitative research studies.

listings.title: Leger
listings.description: Leger is a top Canadian market research firm conducting surveys, focus groups, and opinion polls. Major panel in Canada and US.

listings.title: Murray Hill National
listings.description: Full-service focus group facility in Dallas, TX. Recruits for qualitative research studies including focus groups, taste tests, and product evaluations.

listings.title: Recruit & Field
listings.description: Research recruitment agency specializing in finding participants for focus groups, in-depth interviews, and online communities.

listings.title: Remesh
listings.description: AI-moderated focus group platform where you participate in live group discussions analyzed by AI. Sessions are text-based and pay $50-150 for 30-60 minutes.

listings.title: Sago (Schlesinger Group)
listings.description: Global research recruitment company (formerly Schlesinger Group). Recruits for focus groups, interviews, online studies, and mock juries. $50-$400 per session.

listings.title: BzzAgent
listings.description: Word-of-mouth marketing platform. Receive free products to try and share your opinions with friends and online. Part of the Swaarm network.

listings.title: Chatterbox by House Party
listings.description: Host branded product sampling events and share products with friends. Receive free product kits and party supplies from major consumer brands.

listings.title: SheSpeaks
listings.description: Women-focused product testing and review community. Receive free products from major brands and share reviews with the community.

listings.title: Smiley360
listings.description: Product testing and word-of-mouth community. Receive free products, share experiences with friends, and provide feedback to brands.

listings.title: Amazon Vine
listings.description: Amazon's invite-only product review program. Vine Voices receive free products in exchange for honest reviews on Amazon.

listings.title: Burt's Bees Hive
listings.description: Burt's Bees product testing community. Test new natural beauty and personal care products before they launch.

listings.title: Google User Research
listings.description: Google's UX research program. Participate in studies about Google products for cash compensation. Remote and in-person at Google offices.

listings.title: Home Tester Club
listings.description: Free product testing community. Apply for product testing campaigns, receive free products at home, and share your honest reviews.

listings.title: Johnson & Johnson Panel
listings.description: J&J recruits consumers to test healthcare, beauty, and baby products. Participants receive compensation and free products.

listings.title: McCormick Consumer Testing
listings.description: McCormick & Company's consumer testing panel. Taste test new spices, seasonings, and food products before they hit shelves.

listings.title: P&G Everyday
listings.description: Procter & Gamble's consumer community. Access coupons, samples, and product testing opportunities for P&G brands like Tide, Pampers, Gillette.

listings.title: PINCHme
listings.description: Free sample box service. Every few weeks, claim free samples of new products from major brands. Provide feedback in exchange.

listings.title: Ripple Street
listings.description: Host product parties and experiences with friends. Receive free products from major brands to try and share with your social circle. Formerly House Party.
cons: Must host a party or gathering

listings.title: Social Nature
listings.description: Try natural and organic products for free in exchange for honest reviews. Focus on health-conscious, eco-friendly, and organic brands.

listings.title: Toluna Product Testing
listings.description: Toluna's product testing arm offers free products to test at home. Combined with their survey platform for extra earning potential.

listings.title: UserTesting Product Board
listings.description: UserTesting also offers product-specific testing campaigns. Test physical and digital products, provide video feedback.

listings.title: iSecretShop
listings.description: Mystery shopping aggregator app. Browse and accept mystery shopping assignments from multiple companies in one place.

listings.title: Quest for Best
listings.description: Mystery shopping company specializing in retail, grocery, and food service evaluations. Offers regular assignments in many US markets.

listings.title: Reality Based Group
listings.description: Customer experience company using mystery shopping and video mystery shopping. Evaluate restaurants, retail, and service businesses.

listings.title: Shoppers Confidential
listings.description: Canadian mystery shopping company. Evaluate retail, food service, and hospitality businesses across Canada.

listings.title: Bare International
listings.description: Global customer experience research company. Mystery shopping, auditing, and customer experience evaluations in 150+ countries.

listings.title: BestMark
listings.description: One of the largest mystery shopping companies in North America. Evaluate restaurants, hotels, retail stores, banks, and more.

listings.title: Confero
listings.description: Mystery shopping and customer experience company. Specializes in automotive, retail, healthcare, and financial services evaluations.

listings.title: Coyle Hospitality
listings.description: Luxury hospitality mystery shopping. Evaluate hotels, resorts, restaurants, and spas. Reimbursed stays and dining at premium locations.

listings.title: IntelliShop
listings.description: Mystery shopping and compliance auditing company. Evaluate customer service at retail stores, restaurants, and service businesses.

listings.title: Market Force
listings.description: Global customer experience management company. Mystery shop major brands including restaurants, retail, grocery, and financial services.

listings.title: MSPA Americas
listings.description: Mystery Shopping Professionals Association directory. Not a shopping company itself but connects you to all legitimate mystery shopping companies.
cons: Directory only — not a direct employer
Not all companies listed are great

listings.title: Secret Shopper
listings.description: One of the original mystery shopping companies. Evaluate retail stores, restaurants, banks, and car dealerships across the US.

listings.title: Sinclair Customer Metrics
listings.description: Customer experience measurement company specializing in hospitality, auto, and financial services mystery shopping.

listings.title: ObvioHealth
listings.description: Virtual clinical trial company specializing in decentralized research. Participate from home for nutrition, wellness, and health studies.

listings.title: ProofPilot
listings.description: Digital clinical trial platform making it easier to participate in research from your phone. Focus on behavioral and wellness studies.

listings.title: CenterWatch
listings.description: Clinical trials listing service and resource for patients. Find actively recruiting studies with compensation in your area.

listings.title: CISCRP
listings.description: Center for Information & Study on Clinical Research Participation. Educational resource helping people find and understand clinical trials.

listings.title: Clara Health
listings.description: AI-powered clinical trial matching platform. Uses artificial intelligence to match patients with relevant trials based on their health profile and preferences.
cons: Not all matches lead to acceptance

listings.title: Clinical Connection
listings.description: Free clinical trial search platform. Find paid medical studies in your area by condition, location, and compensation level.
